moves.name: Stand LP
moves.notes: Different stand LP from the level 1 Drink Level version | Generally better frame advantage than the Level 1 Drink stand LP, but much less range and no Target Combo or chain cancels

moves.name: Stand MP
moves.notes: Jamie's main frametrap / combo tool

moves.name: Stand HP
moves.notes: Very fast start-up and fast 3-hit string makes this a super strong tool against Drive Impacts and other armor moves | Last hit has pretty good range and makes for a good whiff punish tool (the third hit is effectively 12F start-up) with +5 on Punish allowing for a follow-up combo (can be spaced so that the third strike hits meaty up to +7 on Punish Counter)

moves.name: Stand LK
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK / stand LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MK
moves.notes: Great poke and buffer tool at close / mid-range | Jamie lifts up his front leg hurtbox on frames 4-12 making this a good tool against low attacks

moves.name: Stand HK
moves.notes: Causes a crumple-like free juggle state on a grounded Punish Counter (opponent is in a grounded state for +9 frames before going airborne) | Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state

moves.name: Crouch LP
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK / stand LK | Jamie's only 4F normal

moves.name: Crouch MP
moves.notes: Good combo / buffer / frametrap tool with strong hitbox priority | +2F extra recovery frames (15F) on whiff

moves.name: Crouch HP
moves.notes: Forces stand | Jamie's head hurtbox is invincible to airborne strikes on frames 8-32

moves.name: Crouch LK
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK / stand LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MK
moves.notes: Incurs 20% hit damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo | Has big pushback on block making this move relatively safe to poke with and to bait retaliations from the opponent

moves.name: Crouch HK
moves.notes: Second hit has quite bit a further range than the first hit | Has a Target Combo follow-up (can hit confirm into this) that's a great way of raising drink level while still maintaining oki mixups in the corner

moves.name: Jump LP
moves.notes: Cross-up | Can be used as an instant Overhead

moves.name: Jump MP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a juggle state | Cancelable into his Divekick (Drink Level 1) during forward jump

moves.name: Jump HP
moves.notes: Spikes down airborne opponents | Has some natural juggle limit (similar to jump MP)

moves.name: Jump LK
moves.notes: Has the furthest horizontal range of all of Jamie's jump-ins

moves.name: Jump MK
moves.notes: Cross-up

moves.name: Jump HK
moves.notes: Amazing air-to-air / anti-air tool due to the rewards it leads to on airborne hit | Both hits put airborne opponents into a limited juggle state

moves.name: Indian Step
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK / stand LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Tensei Kick
moves.notes: Jamie's head and kicking leg hurtboxes are invincible to airborne strikes on frames 9-11 (during the 3 active frames) | Jump cancelable on HIT only (Jamie always jumps forward no matter which up direction is pressed)

moves.name: Falling Star Kick
moves.notes: Overhead | High profile (crushes lows) on frames 10-19

moves.name: Hermit's Elbow
moves.notes: Jamie pulls back his hurtboxes on frames 5-12 before striking back with his elbow (can be used to avoid throws and attacks, and then Punish Countering them) | Doesn't pull back the hurtboxes as far or have as much range as the Drink Level 3 version (but has better combo potential)

moves.name: Senei Kick
moves.notes: Not a low attack (despite what it looks like) | Very good range (reaches about 60% screen length)

moves.name: Phantom Sway
moves.notes: Jamie's optimal juggle ender to raising his drink levels | Has a high Juggle Limit

moves.name: Phantom Sway + Drink
moves.notes: Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie | Restores 1/4 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/24th (~4%) of Burnout Gauge

moves.name: Back Shaver
moves.notes: Throw Loop: Dash up for +4 mixup between throw/strike (not possible on mid-screen back-roll) | Can press / hold the LK button during the throw to restore 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge while sacrificing some oki (+7 KD instead of +23)

moves.name: Wheel Punch
moves.notes: Back Throw Loop: Can Drive Rush into meaty strike / throw mix when performed while cornered | Can also do meaty MP / OD Palm for + frames as well as both giving follow-up combos on hit

moves.name: Drive Impact: Vainglory Strike
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frames 1-27 | Damages opponents Drive Gauge on Block (1/2 bar) | Hit (1 bar) | Counter-Hit (1.25 bar) | Punish Counter (1.5 bar)

moves.name: Drive Reversal: Leg Sweep
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-22 (frames 1-20 when used on wake-up as a Reversal) | Armor Break (blows through all armor like Drive Impact)

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: Parries all strikes and projectiles (high and low) from frame 1 | 12F parry window (can hold the parry to extend the parry window)

moves.name: Drive Rush
moves.notes: Dashes forward and enhances the next normal used out of the Drive Rush with +4 extra hitstun / blockstun (some moves also get unique properties enhanced such as juggle state) | The +4 bonus frame advantage gained from a Drive Rush enhanced move also stacks with any bonus frame advantage that move may have gained from Counter-Hit or Punish Counter

moves.name: Taunt
moves.notes: His taunts change depending on drink level | Jamie's neutral taunt where he leans down momentarily can avoid a lot of attacks (his hurtbox lies down)

moves.name: The Devil Inside
moves.notes: Jamie's Drink Level affects his damage / move list / framedata / movement and various other properties | Drink Level 0 damage output: 90%

moves.name: The Devil Inside (2 drinks)
moves.notes: Increases Drink Level by 2 | Restores 1/2 bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge while in Drink Levels 0-3

moves.name: The Devil Inside (3 drinks)
moves.notes: Increases Drink Level by 3 | Restores 3/4th bar of Drive Gauge | 1/8th (12.5%) of Burnout Gauge while in Drink Levels 03

moves.name: The Devil Inside (4 drinks)
moves.notes: Increases Drink Level by 4 | Restores 1 bar of Drive Gauge | 1/6th (~17%) of Burnout Gauge while in Drink Levels 0-3

moves.name: The Devil Inside (DR4 activation)
moves.notes: This move happens automatically when Jamie reaches drink level 4 | This automatic activation cuts the recovery frames a bit short on all the moves that reach Drink Level 4, potentially granting far better oki scenarios upon activation

moves.name: LP Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff) | Canceling into further Rekka punches is delayed a few frames on whiff compared to on hit / block

moves.name: LP Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 2F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: LP Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 1-5F gap on block depending on how delayed this final Rekka is

moves.name: LP Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: First kick follow-up is only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 3F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: LP Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie as well as restoring 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge | Second kick follow-up can be performed on whiff if the second kick whiffs

moves.name: MP Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff) | Canceling into further Rekka punches is delayed a few frames on whiff compared to on hit / block

moves.name: MP Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 5F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: MP Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 2-6F gap on block depending on how delayed this final Rekka is

moves.name: MP Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: First kick follow-up is only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | 1-6F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: MP Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie as well as restoring 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge | Second kick follow-up can be performed on whiff if the second kick whiffs

moves.name: HP Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff) | Canceling into further Rekka punches is delayed a few frames on whiff compared to on hit / block

moves.name: HP Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 3-8F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: HP Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 3-7F gap on block depending on how delayed this final Rekka is

moves.name: HP Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: First kick follow-up is only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | 4-9F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: HP Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie as well as restoring 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge | Second kick follow-up can be performed on whiff if the second kick whiffs

moves.name: OD Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff) | The follow-up punch rekkas do not count as separate hits in terms of damage scaling (all hits deal the same damage %)

moves.name: OD Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 3F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: OD Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 2F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: OD Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: First kick follow-up is only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 4F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: OD Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Only Drink Rekka ender that's + on knockdown, granting Jamie an oki situation when used on a cornered opponent | Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie as well as restoring 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge

moves.name: LP Swagger Step
moves.notes: A lot of active frames can be made + on block via spacing or oki | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: MP Swagger Step
moves.notes: A lot of active frames can be made + on block via spacing or oki | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: HP Swagger Step
moves.notes: Safe on block unlike LP/MP Palm and also +42 KD which sets Jamie up for a safe jump (same as his LK Breakdance at Drink Levels 2+) | A lot of active frames can be made + on block via spacing or oki

moves.name: OD Swagger Step
moves.notes: Sends opponents tumbling backwards (can hit them OTG in this tumbling state) | On a grounded Punish Counter; the tumbling (KD +87) can lead into a low wall splat (HKD +155)

moves.name: LK Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-11 | Low crushes on frames 5-22

moves.name: MK Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-14 | Low crushes on frames 8-23

moves.name: HK Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-16 | Low crushes on frames 10-25

moves.name: OD Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-9 | Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 10-12

moves.name: Breakin'
moves.notes: Strike and Throw invincible on frames 1-12 | Armor Break

moves.name: The Devil's Song
moves.notes: Duration of 900 frames (15 seconds) - The remaining timer freezes during any hitstop | Temporarily grants Jamie access to Drink Level 4 as well as restoring 1 bar of Drive Gauge | 1/6th (~17%) of Burnout Gauge

moves.name: Getsuga Saiho
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-12 | Launches the opponent into a free juggle state on the regular version

moves.name: Getsuga Saiho (Critical Art)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-12 | Only goes into cinematic on first hit (only get a regular +14 knockdown for 450 damage on second hit)

moves.name: Stand LP
moves.notes: Very good range for a light normal (slightly shorter range hitbox for crouching opponents) | Cancelable into the LP > LK > MP target combo (works even from max range stand LP)

moves.name: Jump MP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a juggle state | Cancelable into his Divekick (Drink Level 1) during forward jump

moves.name: Jump HP
moves.notes: Spikes down airborne opponents | Has some natural juggle limit (similar to jump MP)

moves.name: Jump LK
moves.notes: Has the furthest horizontal range of all of Jamie's jump-ins

moves.name: Jump MK
moves.notes: Cross-up

moves.name: Jump HK
moves.notes: Amazing air-to-air / anti-air tool due to the rewards it leads to on airborne hit | Both hits put airborne opponents into a limited juggle state

moves.name: Indian Step
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK / stand LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Tensei Kick
moves.notes: Jamie's head and kicking leg hurtboxes are invincible to airborne strikes on frames 9-11 (during the 3 active frames) | Jump cancelable on HIT only (Jamie always jumps forward no matter which up direction is pressed)

moves.name: Falling Star Kick
moves.notes: Overhead | High profile (crushes lows) on frames 10-19

moves.name: Hermit's Elbow
moves.notes: Jamie pulls back his hurtboxes on frames 5-12 before striking back with his elbow (can be used to avoid throws and attacks, and then Punish Countering them) | Doesn't pull back the hurtboxes as far or have as much range as the Drink Level 3 version (but has better combo potential)

moves.name: Senei Kick
moves.notes: Not a low attack (despite what it looks like) | Very good range (reaches about 60% screen length)

moves.name: Phantom Sway
moves.notes: Jamie's optimal juggle ender to raising his drink levels | Has a high Juggle Limit

moves.name: Phantom Sway + Drink
moves.notes: Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie | Restores 1/4 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/24th (~4%) of Burnout Gauge

moves.name: Bitter Strikes 1 (Drink 1)
moves.notes: Good checking tool in neutral against incoming moves like Drive Rush | The follow-up MP is hit confirmable on hit/block

moves.name: Bitter Strikes 2 (Drink 1)
moves.notes: Primary combo tool | Fully cancelable unlike the second hit

moves.name: Full Moon Kick (Drink 2)
moves.notes: 17F Target Combo hit confirm window makes this a hit confirmable low crushing Overhead that leads to a drink (nice!) | First hit is an Overhead

moves.name: Full Moon Kick + Drink (Drink 2)
moves.notes: Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie as well as restoring 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge | +3 extra KDA (+2 KD) if Jamie reaches level 4 activation with this drink

moves.name: Back Shaver
moves.notes: Throw Loop: Dash up for +4 mixup between throw/strike (not possible on mid-screen back-roll) | Can press / hold the LK button during the throw to restore 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge while sacrificing some oki (+7 KD instead of +23)

moves.name: Wheel Punch
moves.notes: Back Throw Loop: Can Drive Rush into meaty strike / throw mix when performed while cornered | Can also do meaty MP / OD Palm for + frames as well as both giving follow-up combos on hit

moves.name: Drive Impact: Vainglory Strike
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frames 1-27 | Damages opponents Drive Gauge on Block (1/2 bar) | Hit (1 bar) | Counter-Hit (1.25 bar) | Punish Counter (1.5 bar)

moves.name: Drive Reversal: Leg Sweep
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-22 (frames 1-20 when used on wake-up as a Reversal) | Armor Break (blows through all armor like Drive Impact)

moves.name: LP Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff) | Canceling into further Rekka punches is delayed a few frames on whiff compared to on hit / block

moves.name: LP Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 2F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: LP Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 1-5F gap on block depending on how delayed this final Rekka is

moves.name: LP Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: First kick follow-up is only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 3F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: LP Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie as well as restoring 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge | Second kick follow-up can be performed on whiff if the second kick whiffs

moves.name: MP Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff) | Canceling into further Rekka punches is delayed a few frames on whiff compared to on hit / block

moves.name: MP Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 5F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: MP Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 2-6F gap on block depending on how delayed this final Rekka is

moves.name: MP Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: First kick follow-up is only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | 1-6F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: MP Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie as well as restoring 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge | Second kick follow-up can be performed on whiff if the second kick whiffs

moves.name: HP Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff) | Canceling into further Rekka punches is delayed a few frames on whiff compared to on hit / block

moves.name: HP Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 3-8F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: HP Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 3-7F gap on block depending on how delayed this final Rekka is

moves.name: HP Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: First kick follow-up is only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | 4-9F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: HP Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie as well as restoring 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge | Second kick follow-up can be performed on whiff if the second kick whiffs

moves.name: OD Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff) | The follow-up punch rekkas do not count as separate hits in terms of damage scaling (all hits deal the same damage %)

moves.name: OD Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 3F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: OD Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 2F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: OD Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: First kick follow-up is only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 4F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: OD Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Only Drink Rekka ender that's + on knockdown, granting Jamie an oki situation when used on a cornered opponent | Grants +1 Drink Level to Jamie as well as restoring 1/2 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/12th (~8%) of Burnout Gauge

moves.name: LP Swagger Step
moves.notes: A lot of active frames can be made + on block via spacing or oki | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: MP Swagger Step
moves.notes: A lot of active frames can be made + on block via spacing or oki | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: HP Swagger Step
moves.notes: Safe on block unlike LP/MP Palm and also +42 KD which sets Jamie up for a safe jump (same as his LK Breakdance at Drink Levels 2+) | A lot of active frames can be made + on block via spacing or oki

moves.name: OD Swagger Step
moves.notes: Sends opponents tumbling backwards (can hit them OTG in this tumbling state) | On a grounded Punish Counter; the tumbling (KD +87) can lead into a low wall splat (HKD +155)

moves.name: LK Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-11 | Low crushes on frames 5-22

moves.name: MK Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-14 | Low crushes on frames 8-23

moves.name: HK Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-16 | Low crushes on frames 10-25

moves.name: OD Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-9 | Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 10-12

moves.name: Luminous Dive Kick (Drink 1)
moves.notes: Not an Overhead | Only possible during a forward jump

moves.name: OD Luminous Dive Kick (Drink 1)
moves.notes: Puts opponent into a limited OTG juggle state | Not an Overhead

moves.name: LK Bakkai (Drink 2)
moves.notes: Projectle invincible on frames 3-43 (until end of active frames) | Cancelable into level 3 Super on Hit / Block

moves.name: MK Bakkai (Drink 2)
moves.notes: Projectle invincible on frames 4-59 (until end of active frames) | Cancelable into level 3 Super on Hit / Block

moves.name: HK Bakkai (Drink 2)
moves.notes: Projectle invincible on frames 5-92 (until end of active frames) | Cancelable into level 3 Super on Hit / Block

moves.name: OD Bakkai (Drink 2)
moves.notes: Projectle invincible on frames 3-100 (until end of active frames) | Cancelable into level 2 and 3 Supers on Hit / Block

moves.name: Breakin'
moves.notes: Strike and Throw invincible on frames 1-12 | Armor Break

moves.name: Getsuga Saiho
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-12 | Launches the opponent into a free juggle state on the regular version

moves.name: Getsuga Saiho (Critical Art)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-12 | Only goes into cinematic on first hit (only get a regular +14 knockdown for 500 damage on second hit)

moves.name: Stand LP
moves.notes: Very good range for a light normal (slightly shorter range hitbox for crouching opponents) | Cancelable into the LP > LK > MP target combo (works even from max range stand LP)

moves.name: Stand MP
moves.notes: Jamie's main frametrap / combo tool

moves.name: Stand HP
moves.notes: Very fast start-up and fast 3-hit string makes this a super strong tool against Drive Impacts | Last hit has pretty good range and makes for a good whiff punish tool (the third hit is effectively 12F start-up) with +5 on Punish allowing for a follow-up combo (can be spaced so that the third strike hits meaty up to +7 on Punish Counter)

moves.name: Stand LK
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK / stand LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Stand MK
moves.notes: Great poke and buffer tool at close / mid-range | Jamie lifts up his front leg hurtbox on frames 4-12 making this a good tool against low attacks

moves.name: Stand HK
moves.notes: Causes a crumple-like free juggle state on a grounded Punish Counter (opponent is in a grounded state for +9 frames before going airborne) | Puts airborne opponents into a limited juggle state

moves.name: Crouch LP
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK / stand LK | Jamie's only 4F normal

moves.name: Crouch MP
moves.notes: Good combo / buffer / frametrap tool with strong hitbox priority | +2F extra recovery frames (15F) on whiff

moves.name: Crouch HP
moves.notes: Forces stand | Jamie's head hurtbox is invincible to airborne strikes on frames 8-32

moves.name: Crouch LK
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK / stand LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Crouch MK
moves.notes: Incurs 20% hit damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo | Has big pushback on block making this move relatively safe to poke with and to bait retaliations from the opponent

moves.name: Crouch HK
moves.notes: Second hit has quite bit a further range than the first hit | Has a Target Combo follow-up (can hit confirm into this) that's a great way of raising drink level while still maintaining oki mixups in the corner

moves.name: Jump LP
moves.notes: Cross-up | Can be used as an instant Overhead

moves.name: Jump MP
moves.notes: Puts airborne opponents into a juggle state | Cancelable into his Divekick (Drink Level 1) during forward jump

moves.name: Intoxicated Assault 2 (Drink 3)

moves.notes: Amazing air-to-air / anti-air tool due to the rewards it leads to on airborne hit | Both hits put airborne opponents into a limited juggle state

moves.name: Indian Step
moves.notes: Chains into crouch LP / crouch LK / stand LK | Incurs 20% damage scaling penalty if used as the first hit of a combo

moves.name: Tensei Kick
moves.notes: Jamie's head and kicking leg hurtboxes are invincible to airborne strikes on frames 9-11 (during the 3 active frames) | Jump cancelable on HIT only (Jamie always jumps forward no matter which up direction is pressed)

moves.name: Falling Star Kick
moves.notes: Overhead | High profile (crushes lows) on frames 10-19

moves.name: Hermit's Elbow
moves.notes: Jamie pulls back his hurtboxes on frames 5-12 before striking back with his elbow (can be used to avoid throws and attacks, and then Punish Countering them) | This Drink Level 3 version pulls the hurtboxes back further and has more range

moves.name: Senei Kick
moves.notes: Not a low attack (despite what it looks like) | Very good range (slightly further than f+HK at lower Drink Levels)

moves.name: Phantom Sway
moves.notes: Jamie's optimal juggle ender to raising his drink levels | Has a high Juggle Limit

moves.name: Phantom Sway + Drink
moves.notes: Restores 1 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/6th (~17%) of Burnout Gauge | Good way to restore some Drive Gauge / Burnout while still maintaining a strike / throw mixup in the corner

moves.name: Bitter Strikes 1 (Drink 1)
moves.notes: Good checking tool in neutral against incoming moves like Drive Rush | The follow-up MP is hit confirmable on hit/block

moves.name: Bitter Strikes 2 (Drink 1)
moves.notes: Primary combo tool | Fully cancelable unlike the second hit

moves.name: Full Moon Kick (Drink 2)
moves.notes: 17F Target Combo hit confirm window makes this a hit confirmable low crushing Overhead that leads to a drink (nice!) | First hit is an Overhead

moves.name: Full Moon Kick + Drink (Drink 2)
moves.notes: Restores 1 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/6th (~17%) of Burnout Gauge

moves.name: Intoxicated Assault 1 (Drink 3)
moves.notes: Cancelable into all Supers on Hit / Block | Jamie pulls back his hurtboxes before striking back with his elbow (can be used to avoid attacks and Punish Countering them)

moves.name: Intoxicated Assault 2 (Drink 3)
moves.notes: Airborne on frames 18-27 (Forced Knockdown state) on the last HK hit | 6F gap between the 2nd and 3rd hit on block (can be interrupted by 6F normals which puts Jamie into a Forced Knockdown state for a follow-up juggle combo

moves.name: Ransui Haze (Drink 4)
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff | Cancels into 3 different follow-ups depending on timing of the punch button between frames 25-100

moves.name: Ransui Haze Headbutt (Drink 4)
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff and reaches quite far | Headbutt can be delayed a lot (23-43F after the Step Kick)

moves.name: Ransui Haze Triple Fist (Drink 4)
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff | Spinning Fists can be delayed a lot (36-60F after the Step Kick)

moves.name: Ransui Haze Drink (Drink 4)
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff | Restores 1 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/6th (~17%) of Burnout Gauge

moves.name: Back Shaver
moves.notes: Throw Loop: Dash up for +4 mixup between throw/strike (not possible on mid-screen back-roll) | Can press / hold the LK button during the throw to restore 1 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/6th (~17%) of Burnout Gauge while sacrificing some oki (+7 KD instead of +23)

moves.name: Wheel Punch
moves.notes: Back Throw Loop: Can Drive Rush into meaty strike / throw mix when performed while cornered | Can also do meaty MP / OD Palm for + frames as well as both giving follow-up combos on hit

moves.name: Drive Impact: Vainglory Strike
moves.notes: 2 hits of armor on frames 1-27 | Damages opponents Drive Gauge on Block (1/2 bar) | Hit (1 bar) | Counter-Hit (1.25 bar) | Punish Counter (1.5 bar)

moves.name: Drive Reversal: Leg Sweep
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-22 (frames 1-20 when used on wake-up as a Reversal) | Armor Break (blows through all armor like Drive Impact)

moves.name: LP Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Carries over Counter-Hit / Punish Counter bonus frame advantage to both hits | Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff)

moves.name: LP Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 2-7F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: LP Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 2-6F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: LP Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: Kick follow-ups are only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | Normally a true blockstring but can have up to a 6F gap on block if this follow-up Rekka input is delayed

moves.name: LP Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Restores 1 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/6th (~17%) of Burnout Gauge | Kick follow-ups are only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups)

moves.name: MP Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Carries over Counter-Hit / Punish Counter bonus frame advantage to both hits | Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff)

moves.name: MP Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 2-7F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: MP Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 2-6F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: MP Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: Kick follow-ups are only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | 2-9F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: MP Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Restores 1 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/6th (~17%) of Burnout Gauge | Kick follow-ups are only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups)

moves.name: HP Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Carries over Counter-Hit / Punish Counter bonus frame advantage to both hits | Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff)

moves.name: HP Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 2-7F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: HP Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 2-6F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: HP Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: Kick follow-ups are only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | 4-11F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: HP Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Restores 1 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/6th (~17%) of Burnout Gauge | Kick follow-ups are only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups)

moves.name: OD Freeflow Strikes
moves.notes: Carries over Counter-Hit / Punish Counter bonus frame advantage to both hits | Cancelable into follow-up Punch / Kick rekkas (Punch rekkas can even be performed on whiff)

moves.name: OD Freeflow Strikes 2
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 2-7F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: OD Freeflow Strikes 3
moves.notes: Can be performed on whiff (but is delayed a few frames compared to when performed on hit / block) | 2-6F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: OD Freeflow Kicks 2
moves.notes: Kick follow-ups are only possible on Hit / Block (not on whiff like the punch follow-ups) | 1-6F gap on block depending on how delayed this follow-up Rekka input is performed

moves.name: OD Freeflow Kicks 3
moves.notes: Only Drink Rekka ender that's + on knockdown, granting Jamie an oki situation when used on a cornered opponent | Restores 1 extra bar of Drive Gauge | 1/6th (~17%)

moves.name: LP Swagger Step
moves.notes: A lot of active frames can be made + on block via spacing or oki | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: MP Swagger Step
moves.notes: A lot of active frames can be made + on block via spacing or oki | Puts the opponent into a limited juggle state on hit

moves.name: HP Swagger Step
moves.notes: Safe on block unlike LP/MP Palm and also +42 KD which sets Jamie up for a safe jump (same as his LK Breakdance at Drink Levels 2+) | A lot of active frames can be made + on block via spacing or oki

moves.name: OD Swagger Step
moves.notes: Sends opponents tumbling backwards (can hit them OTG in this tumbling state) | On a grounded Punish Counter; the tumbling (KD +87) can lead into a low wall splat (HKD +155)

moves.name: LK Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-11 | Low crushes on frames 5-22

moves.name: MK Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-14 | Low crushes on frames 8-23

moves.name: HK Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 1-16 | Low crushes on frames 10-25

moves.name: OD Arrow Kick
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-9 | Invincible to airborne strikes on frames 10-12

moves.name: Luminous Dive Kick (Drink 1)
moves.notes: Not an Overhead | Only possible during a forward jump

moves.name: OD Luminous Dive Kick (Drink 1)
moves.notes: Puts opponent into a limited OTG juggle state | Not an Overhead

moves.name: LK Bakkai (Drink 2)
moves.notes: Projectle invincible on frames 3-43 (until end of active frames) | Cancelable into level 3 Super on Hit / Block

moves.name: MK Bakkai (Drink 2)
moves.notes: Projectle invincible on frames 4-59 (until end of active frames) | Cancelable into level 3 Super on Hit / Block

moves.name: HK Bakkai (Drink 2)
moves.notes: Projectle invincible on frames 5-92 (until end of active frames) | Cancelable into level 3 Super on Hit / Block

moves.name: OD Bakkai (Drink 2)
moves.notes: Projectle invincible on frames 3-100 (until end of active frames) | Cancelable into level 2 and 3 Supers on Hit / Block

moves.name: Tenshin (Drink 3)
moves.notes: Range: 0.96 | Jamie cannot cancel into this command grab

moves.name: OD Tenshin (Drink 3)
moves.notes: Range: 0.96 | Jamie cannot cancel into this command grab

moves.name: LP Swagger Hermit Punch (Drink 4)
moves.notes: Cancelable into level 3 Super on Hit / Block | Follow-up Palm hit counts as a second hit in terms of damage scaling

moves.name: MP Swagger Hermit Punch (Drink 4)
moves.notes: Cancelable into level 3 Super on Hit / Block | Follow-up Palm hit counts as a second hit in terms of damage scaling

moves.name: HP Swagger Hermit Punch (Drink 4)
moves.notes: Cancelable into level 3 Super on Hit / Block | Follow-up Palm hit counts as a second hit in terms of damage scaling

moves.name: OD Swagger Hermit Punch (Drink 4)
moves.notes: Cancelable into level 2 and 3 Supers on Hit / Block | First Palm hit counts as 2 hits of damage scaling when it hits as the start of a combo

moves.name: Breakin'
moves.notes: Strike and Throw invincible on frames 1-12 | Armor Break

moves.name: Getsuga Saiho
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-12 | Launches the opponent into a free juggle state on the regular version

moves.name: Getsuga Saiho (Critical Art)
moves.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-12 | Only goes into cinematic on first hit (only get a regular +14 knockdown for 550 damage on second hit)
